channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: UFC star KOs opponent, pays tribute to Trump
item.description: UFC star Dominick Reyes paid tribute to President Donald Trump on Saturday night after he knocked out Nikita Krylov at UFC 314. Reyes thanked his Lord, Jesus Christ.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tom Brady teases WrestleMania 41 appearance
item.description: Tom Brady, a Las Vegas Raiders' minority owner, talked to Fox News Digital about the possibility of making an appearance at WrestleMania 41 next weekend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utah scores four power play goals in 5-3 victory
item.description: DALLAS (AP) - Logan Cooley had a goal and two assists to lead the Utah Hockey Club to a 5-3 win against the Dallas Stars at American Airlines Center on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Rowdies lose homecoming matchup, but stadium comeback brings hope
item.description: For the first time in seven months, Rowdies fans are finally back home at Al Lang Stadium after the waterfront venue was impacted during back-to-back hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Georgia McCarthur, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Fan reaches into Mike Trout's glove to snatch a catch from Angels outfielder
item.description: A fan grabbed the ball out of Mike Trout's glove after the Los Angeles Angels star reached into the right field stands Saturday night to make what appeared to be a great catch against the Houston Astros
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Rory McIlroy has masterful start at Augusta and closes in on career Grand Slam
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — The greatest start in the 91-year history of the Masters wasn't enough for Rory McIlroy. He delivered what looked to be a haymaker late Saturday afternoon, a 6-iron so majestic and pure that he walked 10 yards before he saw it land 6 feet away for eagle on the 15th hole.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Patrick Reed and Ludvig Aberg make Saturday moves at the Masters. Justin Rose drops back
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Patrick Reed says his putter has been “on vacation.” Golf fans who primarily watch major championships and the PGA Tour might have the impression that Reed has been lounging on a beach somewhere, too.
item.dc:creator: BEN NUCKOLS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Arch Manning hype train will lead to Texas star becoming college football's 'ultimate villain,' ESPN host says
item.description: Rece Davis of ESPN's "College GameDay" weighed in the role Arch Manning could end up playing in his college career given all the attention he has drawn.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Piastri on pole and Norris only sixth in qualifying for F1's Bahrain Grand Prix
item.description: Oscar Piastri took pole in qualifying for the Bahrain Grand Prix on Saturday as his McLaren teammate and Formula 1 standings leader Lando Norris could only manage sixth. George Russell was a surprisingly strong challenger and placed second for Mercedes, .168 of a second off Piastri's time.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ELLINGWORTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cowboys' Dak Prescott says he could 'definitely' play 'today' as he recovers from hamstring injury
item.description: Dallas Cowboys quarterback Dak Prescott said that he "definitely" could play right now after he underwent surgery on his hamstring in November.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Game 82: The end of the line for some in the NBA, decision day for others
item.description: Game 82 for every team in the NBA has arrived. For 10 clubs, it's the end of the season. For 13 others, it's one last game before the postseason. And for seven teams in the Western Conference, Game 82 might feel like Game 7.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tennessee moves on from Nico Iamaleava after QB skipped practice amid NIL negotiations: reports
item.description: Tennessee head coach Josh Heupel reportedly told the team that they moved on from quarterback Nico Iamaleava a day after he skipped practice amid NIL contract negotiations.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Baseball Hall of Famer Ken Griffey Jr. relishing chance to photograph Masters
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Ken Griffey Jr.’s wife, Melissa, asked if he could do some chores around the house this weekend. “No,” he told her, “I have to work the Masters.” They haven't spoken in a few days, he said kiddingly.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The NBA's playoff chase will end Sunday. Here's a look at what's happening
item.description: With one day left, the NBA playoff picture is still not in complete focus. It’s crystal-clear in the Eastern Conference, where two playoff matchups are known, the top six seeds are set and the four play-in spots are all locked in. In the Western Conference, there’s still much to be decided.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodgers host the Cubs on 7-game home win streak
item.description: Chicago Cubs (9-7, second in the NL Central) vs. Los Angeles Dodgers (11-4, third in the NL West) Los Angeles; Saturday, 9:10 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Tom Brady flashes legendary arm for fans at grand opening of new store; discusses Joe Montana, Super Bowl win
item.description: NFL legend Tom Brady opened up a CardVault by Tom Brady store at the American Dream and offered fans a treat by throwing footballs to them.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Luka and the Lakers believe they can win a championship after wrapping up the Pacific title
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — After the Los Angeles Lakers beat Houston on Friday night to clinch the Pacific Division title and the third seed in the playoffs with their 50th victory of the season, their postgame celebration was both wild and wet.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fruita and Palisade show off defensive skill in 2-1 Wildcats win
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — We had an absolute showdown between two worthy Southwestern League foes at Suplizio Field Friday. Fruita pitchers Gavin Cardoza (1.62 ERA Friday) and Noah Brackett (0 ERA Friday) shut down Palisade's offense after a first-inning run.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: White Sox enter matchup with the Red Sox on losing streak
item.description: Boston Red Sox (7-7, third in the AL East) vs. Chicago White Sox (2-10, fifth in the AL Central) Chicago; Friday, 7:40 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks score 4 3rd-period goals for 5-2 win over Bruins
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Nick Foligno scored a pair of goals, Arvid Soderblom made 31 saves and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Boston Bruins 5-2 on Thursday night. Ryan Donato, Tyler Bertuzzi and Kevin Korchinski also had goals for the Blackhawks, who scored four goals in third period to pull away.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bulls beat Heat behind Giddey's triple-double, move ahead of Miami for play-in home game
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Bulls have just one game left at the United Center on their regular-season schedule. But they took a big step toward securing at least one more home game for the Eastern Conference play-in tournament.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Like father, like son: Shoei Darvish steps on the hill for Dons
item.description: With a flurry of pitches, Shoei Darvish showed the skills that we've already seen in Petco Park from his father. But make no mistake, this junior righty is doing it on his terms - but with some talented influence.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: Jazz end 9-game skid with overtime win over Blazers
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In what has been an insufferable season for Utah Jazz fans, the team gave them a treat Wednesday night -- a thrilling overtime victory.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Babe Ruth's former Florida home goes up for sale for nearly $2M
item.description: A Florida home with historical ties, including to baseball legend Babe Ruth, hit the market for just under $2 million.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WGN 9

item.title: Babe Ruth's former Florida home goes up for sale for nearly $2M
item.description: The 1924 craftsman bungalow, located in St. Petersburg's Historic Old Northeast neighborhood, once belonged to Ruth, according to the real estate listing.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, NewsNation

item.title: Nolan Jones draws walk with bases-loaded to give Guardians 1-0 victory over White Sox in home opener
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Nolan Jones drew a bases-loaded walk from Mike Clevinger in the ninth inning, and the Cleveland Guardians won their home opener 1-0 over the Chicago White Sox on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Giants 2025 City Connect uniforms draw mixed reactions on social media
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The San Francisco Giants will debut their new City Connect uniforms Tuesday night when they welcome the Cincinnati Reds to Oracle Park. Ahead of the game, the team gave fans a preview of the uniforms in a post on X, formerly Twitter.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Egor Demin leaves BYU for NBA Draft
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU standout point guard Egor Demin has decided to leave BYU after one season and declare for the NBA Draft. Demin made the announcement at a press conference held at the school Tuesday morning.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Tickets to the Salt Lake Bees new stadium will cost you more than they used to
item.description: The Salt Lake Bees are playing their first game at the new ballpark in South Jordan tomorrow, though fans of the team might notice that prices are a little different than Smith's Ballpark.
item.dc:creator: Sorina Trauntvein, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago Bears announce five free agency signings
item.description: The Chicago Bears announced five free agency signings, including restricted free-agent defensive tackle Chris Williams and exclusive rights free agents defensive linemen Jonathan Ford and Daniel Hardy, offensive lineman Bill Murray and defensive back Ameer Speed.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Trump honors Dodgers' 2024 World Series championship team
item.description: The 2024 World Series Champions, the Los Angeles Dodgers, were honored by President Donald Trump at the White House on Monday before opening a series with the Washington Nationals.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, Fox 5

item.title: Florida makes push all the way to NCAA title game, will face Houston team that pushes others around
item.description: Florida has gone from being picked to finish sixth in the rugged Southeastern Conference to pushing all the way to the final Monday night of the season.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: LA Dodgers visit White House to celebrate World Series win
item.description: Team president Stan Kasten said all the players wanted to attend, according to the Los Angeles Times.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, NewsNation

item.title: Justin Turner's error allows Fernando Tatis Jr. to score go-ahead run in Padres' 8-7 win over Cubs
item.description: Luis Arraez had four hits, Fernando Tatis Jr. scored the go-ahead run in the ninth inning when first baseman Justin Turner couldn't make the catch to finish a double play, and the San Diego Padres beat the Chicago Cubs 8-7 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: SARAH TROTTO Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: UConn is back on top of women’s basketball, winning its 12th national championship by routing defending champion South Carolina 82-59 on Sunday behind Azzi Fudd’s 24 points.
item.dc:creator: Dough Feinberg, WFLA, NBC
